preconditions: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in a supported browser
Application server is running and the home page loads successfully
User is on the home page before starting each test unless otherwise specified

testCases.title: Verify all approved navigation controls and action buttons are visible and enabled on the home page
steps: Observe the top navigation section and main action button section of the page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Person navigation button is visible with no broken icon or missing label', 'Back navigation button is visible with no broken icon or missing label', 'Notification button is visible with no broken icon or missing label', 'Home navigation link is visible and rendered correctly', 'Customer Signup button is visible and enabled', 'Clean Survey button is visible and enabled', 'Site Survey button is visible and enabled', 'All approved controls are clickable and displayed without overlap, truncation, or layout distortion']

testCases.title: Verify clicking the person navigation button redirects the user to the login page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Current page changes from the home page to the login page', 'Browser URL updates to http://localhost/washtabui/login?data=undefined', 'Login page content is displayed successfully', 'No application error message, blank page, or failed navigation state is displayed']

testCases.title: Verify customer signup button opens the customer-search page
testCases.expectedResult: ['User is redirected from the home page to the customer-search page', 'Customer-search page content is fully visible after navigation', 'Target page loads without blank sections, broken UI elements, or browser errors']

testCases.title: Verify clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
testCases.expectedResult: ['User is redirected from the home page to the vehicle-survey page', 'Vehicle-survey page content becomes visible and usable', 'Navigation completes without page freeze, browser warning, or application error']

testCases.title: Verify site survey button opens the survey page
testCases.expectedResult: ['User is redirected from the home page to the survey page', 'Survey page content is displayed successfully', 'No unexpected popup, loading loop, or rendering issue appears during navigation']

testCases.title: Verify clicking the home navigation link while already on the home page does not trigger incorrect navigation
testCases.expectedResult: ['User remains on the home page after clicking the Home navigation link', 'Home page URL continues to reference the home route', 'Page content reloads correctly or remains stable without duplicate overlays or navigation errors']

testCases.title: Verify notification button interaction does not break the application UI
testCases.expectedResult: ['Notification button responds to the click action', 'Application UI remains responsive after interaction', 'If a notification panel or notification page exists, it is displayed correctly without visual corruption', 'No crash message, script error, or blank screen appears']

testCases.title: Verify back navigation button behavior from the home page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Application handles the back action without crashing', 'User is either navigated to the previous browser page or remains on the current home page', 'No blank screen, broken layout, or unresponsive state is displayed after clicking Back']

testCases.title: Verify all approved controls are keyboard accessible using tab navigation
steps: Press the Tab key repeatedly to move focus through the page controls
Observe focus movement across Person, Back, Notification, Home, Customer Signup, Clean Survey, and Site Survey controls
testCases.expectedResult: ['Keyboard focus reaches all approved interactive elements', 'Focused elements display a visible focus indicator or highlight', 'No approved control is skipped or inaccessible through keyboard-only navigation']

testCases.title: Verify direct access to the home page URL loads the correct page
steps: Enter the URL http://localhost/washtabui/home directly into the browser address bar
testCases.expectedResult: ['Home page loads successfully in the new browser session', 'All approved navigation controls and action buttons are visible', 'No authentication warning, access denial message, or broken page content is displayed']

testCases.title: Verify browser refresh retains a stable home page state
steps: Refresh the browser using the refresh button or F5 key
testCases.expectedResult: ['Home page reloads successfully after refresh', 'All approved controls remain visible and functional after reload', 'No duplicate controls, missing assets, stale content, or script errors appear']

testCases.title: Verify browser back navigation returns the user to the home page after opening the login page
steps: Click the Person navigation button to open the login page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Browser returns to the home page successfully', 'All home page controls are displayed correctly after returning', 'No stale loading state, navigation error, or partially rendered page is displayed']

testCases.title: Verify browser back navigation returns the user to the home page after opening the customer-search page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Browser returns to the home page successfully', 'Home page buttons remain visible and functional after returning', 'No broken navigation state, duplicated content, or blank section appears']

testCases.title: Verify the home page does not display disabled or visually broken approved controls during initial load
steps: Observe all approved controls immediately after the page finishes loading
testCases.expectedResult: ['All approved controls are fully rendered on initial page load', 'No approved control appears unintentionally disabled', 'No overlapping text, broken icons, clipped labels, or missing button text is visible']

testCases.title: Verify clicking non-interactive blank areas around buttons does not trigger navigation
steps: Click blank areas and margins surrounding the visible action buttons without directly clicking the controls
testCases.expectedResult: ['No navigation or button action is triggered when non-interactive areas are clicked', 'User remains on the home page', 'No hidden click area, unexpected redirect, or popup appears']

testCases.title: Verify multiple sequential navigations from the home page work consistently without degrading the UI state
steps: Click the Customer Signup button and return to the home page using browser back navigation
Click the Clean Survey button and return to the home page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Each button opens the correct target page during the sequence', 'Returning to the home page preserves button visibility and functionality', 'Final navigation to the survey page succeeds without degraded performance, missing controls, or navigation failure']

testCases.title: Verify browser forward navigation restores the previously opened page after returning to the home page
steps: Use the browser back button to return to the home page
testCases.expectedResult: ['Browser forward navigation returns the user to the customer-search page', 'Customer-search page content loads correctly after forward navigation', 'No stale page state, broken layout, or navigation error appears']

testCases.title: Verify home page controls remain functional after multiple browser refresh operations
steps: Refresh the page multiple times consecutively using the browser refresh option or F5 key
Click the Person navigation button after the final refresh
testCases.expectedResult: ['Home page reloads successfully after each refresh', 'No duplicate controls or rendering artifacts appear after repeated refreshes', 'Person navigation button remains functional and opens the login page successfully after the final refresh']
